about.intro: I'm a *Software Engineer* who builds across the **full stack**, **cloud infrastructure**, **data systems**, and **AI-assisted DevOps**.
about.description: From **React** and **TypeScript** frontends to **Go**, **Python**, and **Java** backends — I design microservices, secure APIs, CI/CD pipelines, observability stacks, and production platforms on **AWS**, **GCP**, and **Azure**.
about.full:
Hi, I'm **Manav Malavia** — a Software Engineer who works across the full software lifecycle: product development, backend architecture, cloud infrastructure, data workflows, and AI-powered operations tooling.

**Languages & foundations:** Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, Go, Java, C#/.NET, SQL, Bash, HTML, and CSS.

**Frameworks & APIs:** React, Next.js, FastAPI, Flask, Django, Node.js, Spring Boot, REST APIs, WebSocket, microservices, Swagger/OpenAPI, Socket.IO, OAuth 2.0, and JWT.

**Databases & messaging:** PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL, Redis, Kafka, Celery, RabbitMQ, data pipelines, async processing, and query optimization.

**Cloud & infrastructure:** AWS, GCP, Azure, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, Helm, Argo CD, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI/CD, Linux, NGINX, AWS Cognito, EKS, and GKE.

**Observability & tooling:** Prometheus, Grafana, Sentry, CloudWatch, Git, Playwright, Cypress, Jira, Stripe, Twilio, Microsoft Graph, Tableau, Pandas, NumPy, Claude API, Cursor AI, and Claude Code.

At **PittBos**, I ship contractor-facing features weekly with React and TypeScript, modernize monolith workflows into Go microservices, secure accounts with OAuth2/JWT/AWS Cognito, automate billing with Stripe and Twilio, and operate releases on AWS with Docker, NGINX, GitLab CI/CD, and Sentry.

At **Allthenticate**, I built passwordless auth in Flask with Socket.IO, accelerated CI/CD with Docker executors, deployed on AWS EKS with Terraform/Helm/Argo CD, and expanded observability with Prometheus, Grafana, and Alertmanager.

At **Northeastern Access Control Systems**, I improved Java/Spring Boot workflows, modernized 20+ internal screens, and automated reporting with Python, SQL, Pandas, NumPy, and Tableau.

I also built **DebugPilot**, an AI-powered DevOps incident debugger using FastAPI, React, Claude API, RAG, Kafka, Redis, Terraform, Helm, Argo CD, and multi-cloud Kubernetes deployments.

**Education:** M.S. Computer Engineering, Northeastern University (GPA 3.8) · B.S. Information Technology, University of Mumbai (GPA 3.5).

projects.title: DebugPilot
projects.description:
An AI-powered DevOps incident debugger that ingests Kubernetes, Terraform, and CI logs and returns root-cause diagnoses with actionable fix steps.

Built with FastAPI, React, Claude API, and runbook-grounded RAG. Deployed across AWS EKS and GCP GKE with Terraform, Helm, Argo CD, and DNS failover — plus an event-driven Kafka and GitHub webhook pipeline, Redis caching, and GitHub Actions CI/CD for hands-free updates.

roadmap.description: Started B.S. in Information Technology at the University of Mumbai — building foundations in Java, SQL, HTML, CSS, and software engineering fundamentals.
Pursued M.S. in Computer Engineering at Northeastern University (GPA 3.8) — cloud computing, algorithms, data science, Python, and agile development.
Software Engineer at Northeastern Access Control Systems — Java, Spring Boot, JavaScript, Python, Pandas, NumPy, SQL, and 20+ Tableau dashboards for access-management workflows.
Software Engineer at Allthenticate — Flask, Socket.IO, Terraform, AWS EKS, Docker, Helm, Argo CD, Celery, Redis, Prometheus, Grafana, and GitLab CI/CD.
Software Engineer at PittBos — React, TypeScript, Go microservices, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, OAuth2, JWT, AWS Cognito, Stripe, Twilio, Docker, NGINX, GitLab CI/CD, Sentry, Cypress, and Playwright.
